title: This video game maker just flashed a 30% upside.
text: Even though the stock only IPO'd in 2021, shares of Roblox Corp NYSE: RBLX have given investors a wild ride in the years since. An initial 130% rally soon gave way to an 85% haircut, but the past eighteen months have seen shares trade comparatively range bound, albeit with their fair share of double and triple-digit percentage moves.

title: Take-Two Interactive sentiment driven by Grand Theft Auto hype: analysts
text: Take-Two Interactive Software Inc (NASDAQ:TTWO)'s second quarter fiscal 2024 financial results are expected to be largely in-line with the video game maker's guidance while its full year outlook is likely to remain unchanged, according to Wedbush analysts.  In an update to clients, they noted that investor sentiment continues to be driven by anticipation for the release of the sixth version of Grand Theft Auto (GTA).

title: 7 Undervalued Stocks to Buy Before Everyone Else
text: Despite multiple macroeconomic issues in the past year, the market looks to finally be turning back up as 2024 nears. In 2022 and 2023, unexpected downturns from the bear market, threats of an impending recession, and inflationary pressure brought down hundreds of growing companies.

title: Take-Two Stock Gets an Upgrade. There's More Than Just Grand Theft Auto.
text: Raymond James analyst Andrew Marok upgraded shares of videogame maker Take-Two to Outperform from Market Perform, and set a $170 target price.

title: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. to Report Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2024 Results on Wednesday, November 8, 2023
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTWO) today announced that it plans to report financial results for the second quarter of its fiscal year 2024, ended September 30, 2023, after the market close on Wednesday, November 8, 2023. The Company plans to hold a conference call to discuss its results at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time, which can be accessed by dialing (877) 407-0984 or (201) 689-8577. A live, listen-only webcast and a replay of the call will be available at.

title: Take-Two Interactive: Strong Game Lineup And Growth Potential
text: Take-Two Interactive Software's recent results fell slightly short of expectations, but its bookings were above its own guidance. TTWO's strong lineup of games and the upcoming release of GTA 6 are expected to drive future growth. The gaming industry is set to rebound, with increased sales and a focus on mobile gaming and console releases.

title: Should You Buy MongoDB Over Take-Two Interactive Stock?
text: Both stocks have the potential for substantial gains in the next three years.

title: Zynga's Socialpoint Studio Launches Top Troops Worldwide
text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Zynga Inc., a wholly-owned publishing label of Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ: TTWO), today announced that its studio, Socialpoint, launched Top Troops, a new mobile game that blends mobile strategy, RPG, and merge mechanics to create a thrilling medieval fantasy adventure of combat and conquest. Top Troops transports players into the colorful Kingdom of King's Bay as two feuding brothers lead their squads into colossal battles of good versus evil. Pla.
